name: HypertensionBloodPressureFollowup
title: Hypertension Blood Pressure Follow-up
description: Recommends blood-pressure documentation for a patient with an active SNOMED CT hypertension condition and no final, amended, or corrected LOINC blood-pressure panel observation.
purpose: Demonstrate CQL-based applicability evaluation through HAPI FHIR Clinical Reasoning.
usage: Invoke $apply with a Patient subject and useServerData=true after installing the referenced Library.

action.title: Record blood pressure
action.description: Record a blood-pressure observation for this patient.
action.textEquivalent: Record a LOINC 85354-9 blood-pressure panel observation.
